title: hippia pilosa
intro: Hippia pilosa, also known as Prickly Poppy, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its distinctive, hairy stems and leaves. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative effects. The health benefits of Hippia pilosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and regulate the nervous system. Hippia pilosa is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
